char_status: Director of 狩灵协会6科, Elder twin of 花坂 family

appearance.clothing: Black leather jacket with blue straps, white shirt, black trousers, combat boots.
appearance.weapon: 天丛云剑, divine greatsword 1.4m; no 恶灵 has survived a direct attack. Sealed in special sheath, carries throwing knives for regular combat, usable as daggers in close quarters.

char_description.overview: Guardian of 天丛云剑, permitted to leave Fukuoka only when the sword must be drawn.
char_description.combat_style: Throwing knives for regular combat, usable as daggers in close quarters. With 天丛云剑, wide slashing strikes drawn with purple-black flames.

char_personality.strengths: Spiritual resilience; calm judgment; stabilizes military morale.
char_personality.quirks: Checks sheath seal when idle; holding conversation with 天丛云剑 before drawing.

char_background.origin: At eighteen, ended his father when 天丛云剑 consumed him, becoming its guardian and joining 狩灵协会1科, where he was confined for four years until the sword was needed. During the First 扭曲, drew the sword to slay a 灾厄级, forcibly given 色彩阶-靛蓝封禁 and transferred to lead the newly formed 狩灵协会6科.
char_background.current_mission: Guard 天丛云剑, protect Fukuoka from 扭曲 as head of 狩灵协会6科.

char_special_abilities.花坂血统: No 灵力 or 灵视, can observe entities with the naked eye and strike them physically, peak human physical capabilities.

char_relationships.花坂 枫: Father, trained under him, then ended his rampage, carrying that weight in every moment with 天丛云剑.
char_relationships.花坂 晴子: Mother, knew and forgave him, never spoke of that night again, which weighs on him more than any words could.
char_relationships.千乐: Younger twin brother, never asked about that night, suspects he knows more than he shows. Their silence is enough, respects the life he built away from the 狩灵协会.
char_relationships.百合子: Youngest sister, tried hardest to shield her from the truth, but she found it herself. She stopped asking about Father, and that cuts deeper than if she had kept asking.
